projectDescription: A lightweight JavaScript library of custom Web Components and core utilities for building dynamic, data-driven SPAs with XHR, event bus, and task queue support.
keyFeatures: ArthaContainer — custom element that fetches, templates, and renders lists of data via XHR
ArthaForm — custom element that serializes inputs and submits via XHR with task-queue feedback
ArthaMessage — custom element for displaying typed status messages (error, info, success, warning)
XHR — thin XMLHttpRequest wrapper with CSRF support, retry, progress, query strings, and file uploads
EventBus — global pub/sub event system built on the native EventTarget API
TaskQueue — singleton queue for tracking in-flight async tasks with promise-based resolution
Config — centralized global settings for locale, currency, XHR defaults, and task queue options
Util — DOM helpers for modals, value resolution, money formatting, and element creation
